title: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Junior Resident Posts
description: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 02 Junior Resident Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
